name: Rob Coventry
initialNotes:
Expectations: resolve concussion flare

Medications: no

symptoms: Cold hands and feet turn blue: 9/10

meetings.summary: Review of 5.5 day fast termination and transition to metabolic rebuilding phase via SRT-3 therapy.
nextSteps: NO MORE FASTING for 6 months (critical for BMR recovery)
Procure T3 immediately (funding expected next week)
Continue strictly controlled refeed (Kempner rice/fruit logic)
Strictly limit caffeine consumption; avoid using it as a cognitive crutch
Wait on HGH until thyroid therapy is established
meetings.notes:
Fast Status: Stopped at 5.5 days (original goal 9) due to suspected ulcer/stomach discomfort. Refeed (Day 6) is going well with rice/fruit; no sharp pains yet.

Metabolism: Discussed the 'ceiling' effect during refeed where metabolic dysfunction limits calorie capacity. Goal is to lift this ceiling using T3 therapy rather than further fasting.

Symptoms: Concussion symptoms (dizziness when bending) and flared tinnitus persist post-fast. Cold extremities noted; explained as normal transition from high-adrenaline fasting state to carb-burning.

Addictions: Heavy caffeine history (4-6 cups). Coach emphasized caffeine management to prevent metabolic crashes and crutches.

meetings.summary: Check-in on Day 4 of fast (planning 9 days). Discussion on T3 procurement, recent car accident impact, and symptom review.
nextSteps: Purchase T3 medication (2 bottles of 10mcg, 2 bottles of 25mcg)
Monitor 'ulcer' pain vs liver pain during refeed
Next Meeting: Discuss BMR goal and Minnesota Starvation Experiment
meetings.notes:
Fast Status: Day 4. Symptoms: Lightheadedness, white/tingly extremities (Raynaud's?), internal buzzing/tinnitus (worsened by recent deer collision/whiplash).

Medical History: Right side lymph nodes removed (jugular resection). Stomach ulcer diagnosed 4 months ago (upper left pain).

Medications: Procuring T3. Plan to run full cycle. 

Discussion: enhancing BMR to fix 'survival torpor' from Long Covid. Walking/activity levels increasing.
